title: 1914 Essential Oil Brand Website
summary: An essential oil brand website and customer automation Lab combining brand design, fragrance formulation, and LINE/Messenger chatbot flows.
html:
1914 Essential Oil Brand Website

Screenshots

Tags: VanillaJS, LINE Chatbot, Messenger Chatbot, Google Dialogflow API, Heroku, AI, Photoshop, UI/UX Design

Brand Overview

1914 is an essential oil brand I created during alternative military service. I handled the full process independently: naming, logo and visual identity, packaging design, fragrance formulation, and customer service automation. The Lab combines biochemistry, design, and engineering into one coherent brand experience.

Product & Experience

  • Develop fragrance formulas with a scientific approach, emphasizing stability and safety
  • Create a consistent visual system: logo, packaging, and marketing materials
  • Build 24/7 customer service flows with LINE and Messenger chatbots

Stack

  • Frontend: VanillaJS
  • Chatbot: LINE, Messenger + Google Dialogflow for semantic understanding
  • Deployment: Heroku
  • Design: UI/UX, branding, and graphic design with Photoshop

Link

  • Website Demo: https://1914.augustwang.com/

Overview

Built from years of product and engineering experience, 8plus is a booking-first consulting platform for deeper conversations around career planning and software development. It combines analytics thinking with practical engineering experience to help users identify strengths and map actionable next steps.

Highlights

  • Minimal, clear interface designed to reduce friction and increase completion rate

title: e-cooperative Guangfu Platform
summary: A disaster-response collaboration platform for Hualien Guangfu, focused on information integration, resource matching, and rapid community coordination.
html:
Guangfu Collaboration Platform (e-cooperative)

Tags: vibe coding, Next.js, Vercel, Python Flask API, UI/UX Design

Background

On 2025/09/23, the Matai'an Creek barrier lake disaster affected the Guangfu area in Hualien. This Lab prototypes a collaboration platform that connects social networks and volunteers to integrate information, improve communication efficiency, and support resource matching.

Goals & Value

  • Integrate disaster information from multiple sources into a standardized data model
  • Support mutual aid and resource matching between volunteers and residents
  • Launch and iterate quickly with a lightweight, maintainable architecture

Stack

  • Frontend: Next.js deployed on Vercel
  • Backend: Python Flask API
  • Design: UI/UX design and information architecture

Screenshot

Link

  • https://www.hopenet-gf.com

title: E-commerce Management Dashboard
highlights: Inventory management automation reduced manual errors by 60%
Real-time data synchronization and notification system
summary: A modern management dashboard for small and medium e-commerce businesses, integrating order management, inventory control, and data analytics.
html:
E-commerce Management Dashboard

Project Background

With the rapid development of e-commerce business, traditional management methods can no longer meet the needs of modern enterprises. This project aims to provide a complete management solution for small and medium-sized e-commerce businesses.

Core Challenges

1. Data Fragmentation

  • Order, inventory, and customer data scattered across different systems
  • Lack of unified data view
  • Insufficient decision-making basis

2. Efficiency Bottlenecks

  • Manual order processing is time-consuming and error-prone
  • Lack of inventory management automation
  • Missing real-time notification mechanisms

3. Scalability Limitations

  • Existing systems cannot support business growth
  • Multi-store management difficulties
  • Complex third-party integrations

Solution

Technical Architecture

Frontend (Next.js 15)
├── App Router
├── Server Components
├── Client Components
└── API Routes

Backend (Prisma + PostgreSQL)
├── Multi-tenant data model
├── Real-time data synchronization
├── Automated workflows
└── RESTful API

UI/UX (Tailwind + Shadcn/ui)
├── Responsive design
├── Accessibility support
├── Dark mode
└── Component-based architecture

Core Feature Modules

📊 Data Dashboard

  • Real-time sales data visualization
  • Multi-dimensional data analysis
  • Custom report generation
  • Trend prediction analysis

📦 Order Management System

  • Automated order processing workflow
  • Batch operation support
  • Status tracking and notifications
  • Return and exchange management

🏪 Inventory Control Center

  • Real-time inventory monitoring
  • Automatic restock alerts
  • Multi-warehouse management
  • Inventory warning system

👥 Customer Relationship Management

  • Customer data integration
  • Purchase behavior analysis
  • Personalized recommendations
  • Customer service ticketing system

Technical Highlights

1. Performance Optimization

  • Server Components: Reduced client-side JavaScript load
  • Incremental Static Regeneration: Ensured data freshness
  • Image Optimization: Automatic WebP conversion and lazy loading
  • Code Splitting: On-demand loading to reduce initial load time

2. User Experience

  • Intuitive Interface: UI design based on user research
  • Fast Response: Optimistic updates and local state management
  • Accessible Design: WCAG 2.1 compliant
  • Multi-language Support: i18n internationalization implementation

3. System Reliability

  • Error Boundaries: Graceful error handling mechanisms
  • Data Backup: Automated backup strategies
  • Monitoring & Alerts: System health monitoring
  • Security Protection: JWT authentication and RBAC permission control

Development Process

1. Requirements Analysis Phase (2 weeks)

  • User interviews and requirement gathering
  • Competitive analysis and market research
  • Technical solution evaluation
  • Project planning

2. Design Phase (3 weeks)

  • User experience design
  • System architecture design
  • Database design
  • API interface design

3. Development Phase (8 weeks)

  • Core feature development
  • Frontend-backend integration
  • Third-party service integration
  • Performance optimization

4. Testing & Deployment Phase (3 weeks)

  • Unit testing and integration testing
  • User acceptance testing
  • Performance testing
  • Production environment deployment

Project Results

Quantitative Metrics

  • Order Processing Efficiency: Improved by 45%
  • Inventory Error Rate: Reduced by 60%
  • User Satisfaction: Improved to 4.8/5.0
  • System Response Time: < 200ms

Business Value

  • Cost Savings: 30% monthly labor cost reduction
  • Revenue Growth: 25% increase in average order value
  • Operational Efficiency: 40% overall efficiency improvement
  • Customer Retention: 35% improvement in retention rate

Technical Challenges & Solutions

Challenge 1: Real-time Processing of Large Data Volumes

Solution:

  • Used PostgreSQL's LISTEN/NOTIFY mechanism
  • Implemented WebSocket connections for real-time data push
  • Adopted pagination and virtual scrolling for large list rendering optimization

Challenge 2: Multi-tenant Data Isolation

Solution:

  • Designed Row-Level Security (RLS) policies
  • Implemented tenant-level data encryption
  • Established comprehensive permission management system

Challenge 3: Third-party Service Integration

Solution:

  • Built unified API Gateway
  • Implemented retry mechanisms and circuit breaker patterns
  • Designed flexible configuration management system

Future Planning

Phase 2: AI Intelligence

  • Intelligent inventory forecasting
  • Personalized recommendation engine
  • Automated customer service chatbot
  • Anomaly detection system

Phase 3: Ecosystem Expansion

  • Mobile app development
  • Open API platform
  • Third-party plugin marketplace
  • Multi-channel integration

Learning & Insights

This project gave me deep understanding of:

  • Full-stack Development Complexity: Comprehensive consideration from user experience to system architecture
  • Performance Optimization Importance: Optimization strategies in big data scenarios
  • User-Centered Design: Product design thinking that truly solves user pain points
  • Team Collaboration: Communication and collaboration skills in cross-functional teams

Want to learn more technical details or discuss implementation solutions for similar projects? Feel free to book a technical consultation.

title: E-commerce Management Dashboard｜電商管理後台
role: 全端開發 & 系統架構
highlights: 庫存管理自動化減少人工錯誤 60%
支援多租戶架構，可擴展至 1000+ 商家
實現即時數據同步和通知系統
summary: 為中小型電商企業打造的現代化管理後台，整合訂單管理、庫存控制與數據分析。
html:
電商管理後台系統

專案背景

隨著電商業務的快速發展，傳統的管理方式已無法滿足現代企業的需求。本專案旨在為中小型電商企業提供一套完整的管理解決方案。

核心挑戰

1. 數據分散問題

  • 訂單、庫存、客戶數據散落在不同系統
  • 缺乏統一的數據視圖
  • 決策依據不足

2. 效率瓶頸

  • 手動處理訂單耗時且容易出錯
  • 庫存管理缺乏自動化
  • 缺乏即時通知機制

3. 擴展性限制

  • 現有系統無法支撐業務增長
  • 多店鋪管理困難
  • 第三方整合複雜

解決方案

技術架構

Frontend (Next.js 15)
├── App Router
├── Server Components
├── Client Components
└── API Routes

Backend (Prisma + PostgreSQL)
├── 多租戶數據模型
├── 即時數據同步
├── 自動化工作流程
└── RESTful API

UI/UX (Tailwind + Shadcn/ui)
├── 響應式設計
├── 無障礙支援
├── 深色模式
└── 元件化架構

核心功能模組

📊 數據儀表板

  • 即時銷售數據視覺化
  • 多維度數據分析
  • 自定義報表生成
  • 趨勢預測分析

📦 訂單管理系統

  • 自動化訂單處理流程
  • 批量操作支援
  • 狀態追蹤與通知
  • 退換貨管理

🏪 庫存控制中心

  • 即時庫存監控
  • 自動補貨提醒
  • 多倉庫管理
  • 庫存預警系統

👥 客戶關係管理

  • 客戶資料整合
  • 購買行為分析
  • 個性化推薦
  • 客服工單系統

技術亮點

1. 效能優化

  • Server Components: 減少客戶端 JavaScript 負載
  • 增量靜態再生: 確保數據即時性
  • 圖片優化: 自動 WebP 轉換和延遲載入
  • 程式碼分割: 按需載入減少初始載入時間

2. 使用者體驗

  • 直觀的操作介面: 基於使用者研究的 UI 設計
  • 快速響應: 樂觀更新和本地狀態管理
  • 無障礙設計: 符合 WCAG 2.1 標準
  • 多語言支援: i18n 國際化實現

3. 系統可靠性

  • 錯誤邊界: 優雅的錯誤處理機制
  • 數據備份: 自動化備份策略
  • 監控告警: 系統健康狀態監控
  • 安全防護: JWT 認證和 RBAC 權限控制

開發流程

1. 需求分析階段 (2週)

  • 使用者訪談和需求收集
  • 競品分析和市場調研
  • 技術方案評估
  • 專案計劃制定

2. 設計階段 (3週)

  • 使用者體驗設計
  • 系統架構設計
  • 資料庫設計
  • API 介面設計

3. 開發階段 (8週)

  • 核心功能開發
  • 前後端整合
  • 第三方服務整合
  • 效能優化

4. 測試部署階段 (3週)

  • 單元測試和整合測試
  • 使用者驗收測試
  • 效能測試
  • 生產環境部署

專案成果

量化指標

  • 訂單處理效率: 提升 45%
  • 庫存錯誤率: 降低 60%
  • 使用者滿意度: 提升至 4.8/5.0
  • 系統響應時間: < 200ms

業務價值

  • 成本節約: 每月節省人力成本 30%
  • 收入增長: 平均訂單價值提升 25%
  • 營運效率: 整體營運效率提升 40%
  • 客戶留存: 客戶留存率提升 35%

技術挑戰與解決

挑戰 1: 大量數據的即時處理

解決方案:

  • 使用 PostgreSQL 的 LISTEN/NOTIFY 機制
  • 實現 WebSocket 連接進行即時數據推送
  • 採用分頁和虛擬捲動優化大列表渲染

挑戰 2: 多租戶數據隔離

解決方案:

  • 設計 Row-Level Security (RLS) 策略
  • 實現租戶級別的數據加密
  • 建立完善的權限管理體系

挑戰 3: 第三方服務整合

解決方案:

  • 建立統一的 API Gateway
  • 實現重試機制和熔斷器模式
  • 設計靈活的配置管理系統

後續規劃

Phase 2: AI 智慧化

  • 智慧庫存預測
  • 個性化推薦引擎
  • 自動化客服機器人
  • 異常檢測系統

Phase 3: 生態擴展

  • 行動端 App 開發
  • 開放 API 平台
  • 第三方外掛市場
  • 多渠道整合

學習與收穫

這個專案讓我深入理解了：

  • 全端開發的複雜性: 從使用者體驗到系統架構的全方位考量
  • 效能優化的重要性: 在大數據量場景下的優化策略
  • 使用者導向設計: 真正解決使用者痛點的產品設計思維
  • 團隊協作: 跨職能團隊的溝通與協作技巧

想了解更多技術細節或討論類似專案的實現方案？歡迎預約技術諮詢。

title: ExperimentLab Medical Analysis Platform
summary: A medical research prototype platform that helps physicians build early prediction models, visualize indicators, and export research reports.
html:
ExperimentLab — Medical Analysis Prototype Platform

Screenshots

Tags: Vue 3, UI/UX Design, Analysis Algorithm

Overview

ExperimentLab is a prototype platform designed to help physicians prepare research proposals. It uses indicator data such as dialysis-related metrics and gene expression signals to build early prediction models and evaluate disease progression or recovery trends.

Feature Focus

  • Visualize indicator data and track trend changes
  • Build baseline model estimates with adjustable parameters
  • Record and export reports for research workflows

Stack

  • Frontend: Vue 3
  • Design: UI/UX design, data visualization

Link

  • https://experimentlab.online/#/

title: 醫學分析預設模型平台
summary: 協助醫師建立研究原型與基礎預測模型的醫學分析平台，支援指標視覺化與研究報表匯出。
html:
ExperimentLab — 醫學分析原型平台

截圖

Tags: Vue 3, UI/UX Design, Analysis Algorithm

專案簡介

協助醫師在申請研究計畫時使用的原型平台，透過指標數據（例如覆膜透析程度、基因表現）建立初步預測模型，評估疾病惡化或好轉的風險趨勢。

功能重點

  • 指標資料視覺化呈現與趨勢追蹤
  • 基礎模型推估與可調參數
  • 記錄與匯出研究用報表

技術棧

  • 設計：UI/UX 設計、資料視覺化

title: Flash Sale API
summary: A backend API designed for high-concurrency flash-sale scenarios, using locking, queues, and caching to prevent overselling and preserve system stability.
html:
Flash Sale API — High-Concurrency Limited Stock Backend

Screenshot

Tags: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Jest

This Lab focuses on limited-stock flash-sale flows under extreme traffic. The system prevents overselling while keeping inventory consistency and service stability.

Core Design

  • Row-level locking with SELECT ... FOR UPDATE to handle race conditions
  • RabbitMQ queue buffering to protect the database from traffic spikes
  • Redis caching to accelerate reads and reduce DB pressure
  • Rate limiting to control malicious or abnormal traffic

API Examples

  • POST /purchase: place an order while guaranteeing no overselling
  • GET /products/:id: query product inventory

Stack

  • Framework: NestJS modular architecture
  • Database: PostgreSQL with TypeORM
  • Queue: RabbitMQ with amqplib
  • Cache: Redis
  • Testing: Jest

Source

  • GitHub: https://github.com/awtw/flash-sale-api

title: flash-sale-api
summary: 面向高併發限量搶購場景的後端 API，透過鎖、佇列與快取避免超賣並維持系統穩定。
html:
Flash Sale API — 高併發限量搶購後端

截圖

Tags: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Jest

本專案針對「高併發限量搶購」設計，確保在極端流量情況下不超賣，並維持庫存一致性與系統穩定性。

核心設計

  • 以行鎖（SELECT ... FOR UPDATE）處理競態條件
  • 以 RabbitMQ 佇列削峰，保護資料庫
  • 以 Redis 快取加速讀取，降低 DB 壓力
  • Rate Limiting 限制惡意或異常流量

API 範例

  • POST /purchase：下單購買（保證不超賣）
  • GET /products/:id：查詢商品庫存

技術棧

  • 框架：NestJS（模組化架構）
  • 資料庫：PostgreSQL（TypeORM）
  • 佇列：RabbitMQ（amqplib）
  • 快取：Redis
  • 測試：Jest

原始碼

  • GitHub：https://github.com/awtw/flash-sale-api

title: SmartCommunityBackEnd
summary: A .NET backend service for smart community applications, covering residents, devices, incident reporting, workflows, and notification modules.
html:
SmartCommunityBackEnd — Smart Community Backend

Tags: .NET, PostgreSQL, Redis, Message Queue, Docker

A backend service for smart community applications, covering residents, devices, community services, and incident reporting. The system emphasizes reliability and observability.

Core Modules

  • User / resident / permission management
  • Device and sensor data collection
  • Incident reporting and workflow: task assignment, processing, and reporting
  • Notification center: email, SMS, and push notifications

Stack

  • Platform: .NET
  • Data: PostgreSQL, Redis
  • Queue: RabbitMQ / Kafka depending on deployment setup
  • Deployment: Docker / docker-compose

Link

  • GitHub: https://github.com/awtw/SmartCommunityBackEnd

title: SmartCommunityBackEnd

SmartCommunityBackEnd — 智慧社區後端

Tags: .NET, PostgreSQL, Redis, Message Queue, Docker

面向智慧社區應用的後端服務，涵蓋住戶、設備、社區服務與事件通報等核心模組，強調可靠性與可觀測性。

核心模組

  • 使用者/住戶/權限管理
  • 設備與感測資料收集
  • 通報與工作流程（任務分派、處理、回報）
  • 通知中心（Email/SMS/推播）

技術棧

  • 平台：.NET
  • 資料：PostgreSQL、Redis
  • 佇列：如 RabbitMQ/Kafka（視部署配置）
  • 佈署：Docker/docker-compose
